news.title:
Jefferies prefers banks like SBI, HDFC Bank, and Axis Bank over auto stocks, citing stable asset quality and credit growth.
Nifty target set at 25,000 with 10% upside; bull case sees 28,000 (+23%) if geopolitical risks ease and oil prices normalize.
news.summary:
Jefferies prefers banks like SBI, HDFC Bank, and Axis Bank over auto stocks, citing stable asset quality and credit growth.
Nifty target set at 25,000 with 10% upside; bull case sees 28,000 (+23%) if geopolitical risks ease and oil prices normalize.

news.title:
HSBC cuts target prices for Indian banks citing Iran conflict risks, asset-side pressures emerging.
HDFC Bank, ICICI, Axis, SBI, Bajaj Finance, & others see reduced targets; LIC Housing noted as defensive.
news.summary:
HSBC cuts target prices for Indian banks citing Iran conflict risks, asset-side pressures emerging.
HDFC Bank, ICICI, Axis, SBI, Bajaj Finance, & others see reduced targets; LIC Housing noted as defensive.

news.title:
Nifty 50's 'April effect' faces challenges from US-Iran tensions, volatile crude prices, and FII outflows.
Banks like HDFC, ICICI, SBI, and Axis Bank are advised for stability; energy and metal sectors may benefit from commodity price surges.
news.summary:
Nifty 50's 'April effect' faces challenges from US-Iran tensions, volatile crude prices, and FII outflows.
Banks like HDFC, ICICI, SBI, and Axis Bank are advised for stability; energy and metal sectors may benefit from commodity price surges.

news.title:
Bank Nifty drops 2% as banking stocks, including Axis, Kotak, and IDFC First, fall post-RBI rupee position cap.
RBI mandates banks to limit net open rupee positions to $100M daily by April 10, 2026, causing market unwinding.
news.summary:
Bank Nifty drops 2% as banking stocks, including Axis, Kotak, and IDFC First, fall post-RBI rupee position cap.
RBI mandates banks to limit net open rupee positions to $100M daily by April 10, 2026, causing market unwinding.

news.title:
Axis Bank drops up to 3% on fears of Rs 4,000 crore losses.
RBI's forex clampdown triggers concerns over mark-to-market losses.
news.summary:
Axis Bank drops up to 3% on fears of Rs 4,000 crore losses.
RBI's forex clampdown triggers concerns over mark-to-market losses.

news.title: Axis Bank sees NSE block trade of Rs. 36.5 Cr for 302,538 shares at Rs. 1,207.
news.summary: Axis Bank sees NSE block trade of Rs. 36.5 Cr for 302,538 shares at Rs. 1,207.

news.title:
Economists warn prolonged oil shock may hit India's growth and earnings; rate hikes unlikely, says Axis Bank's Neelkanth Mishra.
JPMorgan's Sajid Chinoy highlights risks of supply disruptions, urging resilience and policy measures amid global volatility.
news.summary:
Economists warn prolonged oil shock may hit India's growth and earnings; rate hikes unlikely, says Axis Bank's Neelkanth Mishra.
JPMorgan's Sajid Chinoy highlights risks of supply disruptions, urging resilience and policy measures amid global volatility.

news.title:
Nomura warns Indian banks' margins to face pressure as deposit growth lags credit growth, impacting profitability and NIM recovery.
Nomura highlights ICICI, Axis as top picks; maintains 'Buy' on HDFC, Kotak, SBI, and others with revised target prices cut by 2-24%.
news.summary:
Nomura warns Indian banks' margins to face pressure as deposit growth lags credit growth, impacting profitability and NIM recovery.
Nomura highlights ICICI, Axis as top picks; maintains 'Buy' on HDFC, Kotak, SBI, and others with revised target prices cut by 2-24%.

news.title:
Retail loan GNPAs in FY26 are being curtailed by major banks.
RBI flagged risky practices, causing bad loans in retail portfolios.
news.summary:
Retail loan GNPAs in FY26 are being curtailed by major banks.
RBI flagged risky practices, causing bad loans in retail portfolios.

news.title: Axis Bank MD & CEO Amitabh Chaudhary discussed banking's strategic role in powering India.
news.summary: Axis Bank MD & CEO Amitabh Chaudhary discussed banking's strategic role in powering India.

news.title:
Axis Bank gets RBI approval for ₹1,500 Cr investment in Axis Finance via rights issue.
The rights issue is expected to be finalized by March 31, 2027.
news.summary:
Axis Bank gets RBI approval for ₹1,500 Cr investment in Axis Finance via rights issue.
The rights issue is expected to be finalized by March 31, 2027.

news.title:
Axis Bank allots 3.27 lakh equity shares under ESOP.
Paid-up capital rises to Rs. 6,215.4M from Rs. 6,214.8M.
news.summary:
Axis Bank allots 3.27 lakh equity shares under ESOP.
Paid-up capital rises to Rs. 6,215.4M from Rs. 6,214.8M.

news.title: Axis Bank approves Rs 15B infusion into Axis Finance Limited.
news.summary: Axis Bank approves Rs 15B infusion into Axis Finance Limited.

news.title:
Investec retains Buy on Axis Bank with TP ₹1,600, citing NII growth focus despite NIM moderation (~3.8%).
Strong credit growth, stabilizing retail trends, and resilience amid PSU competition and geopolitical risks support outlook.
news.summary:
Investec retains Buy on Axis Bank with TP ₹1,600, citing NII growth focus despite NIM moderation (~3.8%).
Strong credit growth, stabilizing retail trends, and resilience amid PSU competition and geopolitical risks support outlook.

news.title:
Valuation gap between PSU and private banks narrows as PSU banks show steady P/E ratios and outperform private peers.
PSU bank index gained 47.3% YoY vs 6.5% for private banks; SBI rose 8.7%, while HDFC Bank fell 18.6% Dec-Mar.
news.summary:
Valuation gap between PSU and private banks narrows as PSU banks show steady P/E ratios and outperform private peers.
PSU bank index gained 47.3% YoY vs 6.5% for private banks; SBI rose 8.7%, while HDFC Bank fell 18.6% Dec-Mar.

news.title:
NCDRC orders Axis Bank to pay ₹3.19 cr to Delhi logistics firm.
Bank held guilty of service deficiency during 2016 demonetisation.
news.summary:
NCDRC orders Axis Bank to pay ₹3.19 cr to Delhi logistics firm.
Bank held guilty of service deficiency during 2016 demonetisation.

news.title:
Axis Bank conducted an analyst/investor meet on March 12, 2026.
Presentation details available on Axis Bank's website; key institutions attended.
news.summary:
Axis Bank conducted an analyst/investor meet on March 12, 2026.
Presentation details available on Axis Bank's website; key institutions attended.

news.title:
Axis Bank shares drop 4.7% to ₹1,252.80, hitting a 7-week low and losing ₹19,016 crore in market value.
Foreign investors pulled ₹33,917 crore in March, amid geopolitical tensions and higher crude prices impacting markets.
news.summary:
Axis Bank shares drop 4.7% to ₹1,252.80, hitting a 7-week low and losing ₹19,016 crore in market value.
Foreign investors pulled ₹33,917 crore in March, amid geopolitical tensions and higher crude prices impacting markets.

news.title:
Axis Bank, ICICI Bank, and HDFC Bank dragged Nifty; Bank Nifty fell 1%. Sensex dropped 640 points, Nifty declined 176 points.
Private banks fell sharply; PSU banks saw limited losses. FIIs sold Rs 4,673 cr, while DIIs bought Rs 6,333 cr, aiding markets.
news.summary:
Axis Bank, ICICI Bank, and HDFC Bank dragged Nifty; Bank Nifty fell 1%. Sensex dropped 640 points, Nifty declined 176 points.
Private banks fell sharply; PSU banks saw limited losses. FIIs sold Rs 4,673 cr, while DIIs bought Rs 6,333 cr, aiding markets.

news.title:
Rupee hits record low at 92.33, down 58 paise due to West Asia conflict.
Crude oil rises to $119/barrel, causing foreign capital outflows in oil-importing markets.
news.summary:
Rupee hits record low at 92.33, down 58 paise due to West Asia conflict.
Crude oil rises to $119/barrel, causing foreign capital outflows in oil-importing markets.
